reviews.text: My partner and I have been patients at the Wimbledon CREATE Fertility clinic, and after much consideration, we decided to cancel our 3-cycle package ,  for several serious reasons. …

I found Create Fertility,Wimbledon, an incompetent, unprofessional, uncaring fertility clinic, one to steer clear of if you are self-funding & or have any fertility complications. My treatment was neglectful, had oversights, inconsistent, …
